name: Windows utilities · Touchscreen helpers (multi_scripts_lib/work)
description: Touchscreen utilities under multi_scripts_lib/work/touchscreen for kiosk or field hardware—UX and hardening considerations for unattended devices.
longDescription: Utilities under `multi_scripts_lib/work/touchscreen` for touch-first Windows setups such as kiosks or field devices. Kiosk deployments imply a stricter threat model: physical access, shared sessions, and accidental escape from full-screen shells. Short summary; full detail in the linked source.
features: Targets touch-first interaction constraints (target sizes, scaling)
Kiosk-oriented guidance: minimise escape hatches and privileged shortcuts where required
highlights: Shows experience beyond traditional keyboard/mouse UX
challenges: Touch targets and display scaling vary per device.
solutions: Test on representative hardware; document minimum resolutions where relevant.
security: Kiosk deployments need hardening—disable escape hatches where required
